response: This code implements the standard matrix multiplication algorithm, where it computes the product of two matrices A (m x n) and B (n x p) to produce a resulting matrix C (m x p). It uses a triple nested loop to iterate over each element of the result matrix, summing the products of corresponding elements from A's rows and B's columns (specifically, C[i][j] = sum over k of A[i][k] * B[k][j]).
